mutation_policy: Aggregate non-mutating public substrate check contract for the top-50/Vanderbilt lane. It runs the committed synthetic handoff dry-run, priority handoff, public clone verification, contributor worklist, worklist verification, and gap-manifest fail-closed checks, then records their rowsets and pass counts. It does not fill reviewer decisions, apply patches, approve people, ingest people, close denominators, verify Vanderbilt as a school, rewrite URLs, accept enrichment facts, publish raw candidate labels or person URLs, or collapse identities.
